title: coix lacryma-jobi f. agrestis
intro: Coix lacryma-jobi f. agrestis, also known as Job's Tears, is an annual or perennial grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Job's Tears include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and reduce stress and anxiety. Job's Tears can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
